title: Revanth to Release ₹2,063 Crore Rythu Bharosa Funds at Kataram
description: The second instalment covers around 36.72 lakh acres. Along with the first phase released on March 23, in which ₹3,590 crore was credited at ₹6,000 per acre, the government has so far disbursed ₹5,653 crore this season.
